title: Web Workers & Comlink
description: Architect "Off-Main-Thread" compute strategies using Web Workers for heavy data processing. Implement Comlink to facilitate seamless communication between the main thread and web workers, maintaining UI responsiveness.
objectives: Architect "Off-Main-Thread" compute strategies using Web Workers for heavy data processing.
Implement Comlink to facilitate seamless communication between the main thread and web workers, maintaining UI responsiveness.
